name: zeststream-brand-voice
description: Brand-voice enforcement for AI-generated marketing copy, built as a Meadows-style system: 4-layer hybrid scorer (regex + rules + embeddings + LLM rubric), mandatory claim-grounding against a source-of-truth YAML so factually-hallucinated-but-on-voice copy can't ship, and a trauma-to-rule promotion loop so the system gets smarter every session.
